# Repository Profile

Use these values in the GitHub repository "About" section and social preview settings.

## Description

Ayaka Blog is an anime-inspired full-stack personal publishing platform built with Vue 3, Spring Boot, MySQL, realtime chat, moderation workflows, and music modules.

## Homepage

https://blog.ayakacloud.cn/

## Topics

- ayaka-blog
- anime-blog
- vue3
- spring-boot
- mysql
- websocket
- full-stack
- personal-blog
- markdown-editor
- content-management
- moderation
- multilingual
- community-platform

- 首页：https://blog.ayakacloud.cn/
